body:
Subject: Q4 Confirmations Review — Thursday 10/25, 2pm

Team,

We need to clear the confirmations backlog before Friday's risk committee. Three weeks of pending items have accumulated across the trading desks, and the regulatory uncertainty on [counterparty] is now resolved enough to move forward.

Please come prepared to address:
- Status of all confirmations held pending regulatory clearance
- Any remaining blockers or counterparty issues
- Proposed timeline to close out the backlog

I'll circulate a draft agenda by COB Wednesday. Confirm your attendance and flag any items you need added.

Sara

Sara Shackleton
Enron Wholesale Services
1400 Smith Street, Houston

Confirmed. I'll be there.

On the agenda — flag that we need an update on the physical gas desk confirmations. We have a cluster of deals tied to the West Coast basis that may need explicit sign-off before we can close them out. If legal has any concerns on those specific items, get them to me before Wednesday so I can brief the desk heads.

Louise

Received. West Coast basis items will be on the agenda — I'll coordinate with legal on any specific concerns before Wednesday.

Sara
